title: serpyllum chamaedrys
intro: Serpyllum chamaedrys, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, wood betony has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of wood betony include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Wood betony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
